Detail: The source-level trade-readiness gate must be enabled.
The tester-only lock may be released only for this nonregistered demo draft.
Symbol lock and allowed symbol are required.
At least 250 signal bars are required.
Stop-level cap must be positive and no more than 300 points.
Freeze-level cap must be positive and no more than 300 points.
Position cap 0.1 lots must not exceed 0.1.
Minimum-lot risk overflow must be disabled.
Account-wide unprotected exposure must be blocked.
Daily loss cap is missing or too high.
Weekly loss cap is missing or too high.
Monthly loss cap is missing or too high.
Equity drawdown cap is missing or too high.
Positions must close on a risk-limit breach.
Daily loss-count cap must not exceed one.
Consecutive-loss cap must not exceed two.
Loss cooldown must be at least 120 minutes.
Daily, weekly, and monthly loss scaling are required.
Daily, weekly, and monthly profit locks are required.
Spread-points cap is missing or too high.
Spread-to-ATR cap is missing or too high.
Spread regime, shock, and scaling guards are required.
All four margin guards are required.
Minimum margin level must be at least 500%.
Profit- and streak-based risk boosts must remain disabled.
Experimental FMLR behavior must remain disabled.
Validated lane requires isolated execution, <=0.45% requested risk, bounded frequency/spread/stop, >=1.20 RR, DI >= -12, and D1 momentum <=12%; requested risk=0.45%.
